questions.question: What's your current churn rate and estimated cost per lost subscriber — do you have predictive models or is it reactive?
questions.intent: Churn is telco's top pain point. Quantifies the business case for SAS Customer Intelligence.
questions.followUp: How far in advance can you identify at-risk subscribers today?

questions.question: How are you handling AML compliance for GCash/Maya mobile wallet transactions — is there real-time monitoring or batch?
questions.intent: E-wallet AML is a hot regulatory area in PH. AMLC scrutiny is increasing on telco-fintechs.
questions.followUp: What's your SAR filing volume and turnaround time?

questions.question: Do you segment your high-value customers differently — what analytics drive your retention offers for premium subscribers?
questions.intent: Top 10% of subscribers generate 60%+ revenue. Targeted retention = SAS use case.
questions.followUp: How do you measure the ROI of retention campaigns today?

questions.question: How are you using CDR data for analytics — network optimization, fraud detection, or customer behavior insights?
questions.intent: CDR is a massive untapped data asset. SAS can process CDR at scale for multiple use cases.
questions.followUp: What volume of CDRs are you processing daily and how quickly?

questions.question: What's your revenue assurance process — how do you detect billing anomalies, interconnect fraud, or margin leakage?
questions.intent: Revenue assurance is often manual in PH telcos. SAS automates anomaly detection at scale.
questions.followUp: What percentage of revenue do you estimate is lost to leakage annually?

questions.question: How personalized are your offers today — real-time contextual offers or batch campaign blasts?
questions.intent: Real-time next-best-offer at the moment of interaction is a SAS differentiator.
questions.followUp: What's your offer acceptance rate and how do you measure it?

questions.question: How do you plan network capacity and investment — is it based on predictive demand modeling or reactive to congestion?
questions.intent: Network CAPEX optimization through forecasting is a strong SAS value story.
questions.followUp: How accurate are your current demand forecasts for network planning?

questions.question: How are you detecting SIM-swap fraud and account takeover — real-time behavioral analytics or post-incident investigation?
questions.intent: SIM-swap is a growing PH problem. SAS real-time scoring can flag suspicious SIM changes instantly.
questions.followUp: How many SIM-swap fraud cases do you handle monthly?
